chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1618 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.6922/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.6923/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 06.03.2025 Mr. Faraz Khan, Advocate along with Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that the petitioner will avail his alternate remedy provided under the law. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
